entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS214) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES:
1. TO ADD TWO OC3 ACCESS CIRCUITS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1202.02E.
2. TO ADD ONE BELKIN COMPONENT SERVICE ENABLING DEVICE (SEDS), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1207.02E.
3. TO ADD ONE OC3 ACCESS CIRCUIT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1221.01E.
4. TO ADD ONE CRITICAL DOMESTIC WIRELINE T3 ACCESS CIRCUIT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1222.01E.
5. TO ADD ONE CRITICAL DOMESTIC WIRELINE T3 ACCESS CIRCUIT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1223.01E.
6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS215) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. ADDITION OF WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1225.01E.
2. ADDITION OF PORT SPEEDS TO NBIP-VPN AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1216.01E.
3. ADDITION OF OC3 ACCESS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1227.01E.
4. ADDITION OF MRC PRICING FOR DOMESTIC METRO ETHERNET SERVICE AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1229.01E
5. ADDITION OF OC12 ACCESS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1230.01E.
6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS216) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO ADD ETHERNET PRIVATE LINE SERVICES AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1198.01E.
2. TO REMOVE CPCS SEDS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1226.02S.
3. TO ADD OC3 ACCESS SERVICE AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1236.01E.
4. TO REMOVE WIRELINE SEDS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1243.01S
5. TO ADD WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1244.01E.
6. TO REDUCE PRICES FOR DOMESTIC IPS PORT SERVICE AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1240.01P.
7. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO ADDS ONE NEW PLANTRONICS SED, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1232.02E.
2. TO ADD SEVENTEEN RIVERBED TECHNOLOGY SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1237.01E.
3. TO ADD A PRICE FOR ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1241.01E.
4. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS220) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES:
1. TO ADDS ONE CISCO SED, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1248.01E.
2. TO CORRECT ERRORS WITH NO IMPACT TO PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1250.01S.
3. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
4. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. ADDITION OF ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBER FOR PREMISE WIRING INSTALLATION AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1238.01E.
2. ADDITION OF WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1254.01E.
3. ADDITION OF CPCS WIRELESS SEDS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1257.01E.
4. ADDITION OF ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR PBIP-VPNS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1251.01E.
5. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO REDUCE THE PRICE ON F5 NETWORKS SERVICE ENABLING DEVICE (SEDS) TO SUPPORT OF U.S. COURT UNDER NETWORX UNIVERSAL CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBE IN SUBMISSION AU1255.01P. 2. TO ADD 10 NEW F5 NETWORKS SERVICE ENABLING DEVICE (SEDS) TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS FOR U.S. COURT UNDER NETWORX UNIVERSAL CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMISSION AU1256.01E.
